name: Pork W/Acorn Squash & Onions
recipeIngredient: 4 lean pork loin or rib chops, 1/2 inch thick (about 1 lb)
2 medium onions, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the pork chops.
2. Cook the pork in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat, turning once to brown on all sides.
3. In a small bowl, mix together sage, salt, pepper, and garlic.
4. Sprinkle half of the sage mixture evenly over the pork.
5. Arrange the onions on top of the pork.
6. Pour the chicken broth around the pork.
7. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
8. Cut the acorn squash crosswise into 1-inch slices, remove seeds and fibers, then cut each slice into fourths.
9. Place the squash pieces over the pork.
10. Sprinkle the remaining sage mixture evenly over the pork and squash.
11. Cover and continue to simmer for about 15 minutes, or until the pork is no longer pink near the bone and the squash is tender.
